pattern_trajectory.notes: 4/20: L1 streak zero for 22 workdays (up from 16 on 4/4) — STUCK → WORSENING. The Brandon/Kate meeting cancellation removed the external forcing function on 4/16; without it, no substitute structural intervention has taken hold. Testing Approach v5 exists and has PUBLISH verdict; send step is the bottleneck. Suggested intervention: treat the send as its own atomic task, not as part of a larger 'work on Testing Approach' block.

check_logic: For each task: compute current_period from today's date and cadence (monthly=YYYY-MM, weekly=YYYY-WNN, quarterly=YYYY-QN). If last_run_period != current_period, the task is due. After running, update last_run and last_run_period.
